question.text: Under REIT Regulations, within how many months from the end of the financial year must a full valuation be completed?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under REIT Regulations, a full valuation shall be conducted once in every financial year and valuation should be done within 3 months from the end of the Financial year. **The Trap:** 2 months is the InvIT valuation timeline, not the REIT timeline. REITs have an additional month (3 vs 2) for completing their annual valuation. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Annual valuation completion: REIT = 3 months from FY end vs InvIT = 2 months from FY end. Half-yearly REIT valuation = within 45 days from September 30.
